name: Builderman : Blocktales
description:
"Kiss me! Son of God!"

Based off of the song "Kiss Me, Son of God" by They Might Be Giants.

Specifically the lyrics:

"I destroyed the bond of friendship and respect. Between the only people left. Who'd even look me in the eye."

Added in lore of "Hatred," as this is based off of the turning point where Builderman is revealed to be hatred.
creator: Just_A_Guy
